Interface JasperIExporter

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
JasperICsvExporter, JasperIDocxExporter, JasperIExcelExporter, JasperIHtmlExporter, JasperIImageExporter, JasperIJsonExporter, JasperIOdsExporter, JasperIOdtExporter, JasperIPdfExporter, JasperIPptxExporter, JasperIRtfExporter, JasperITextExporter, JasperIXlsxExporter, JasperIXmlExporter
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractJasperExcelExporter, AbstractJasperExporter, JasperCsvExporter, JasperDocxExporter, JasperHtmlExporter, JasperImageExporter, JasperJsonExporter, JasperOdsExporter, JasperOdtExporter, JasperPdfExporter, JasperPptxExporter, JasperRtfExporter, JasperTextExporter, JasperXlsxExporter, JasperXmlExporter
public interface JasperIExporter extends Serializable

JasperIExporter interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
